an1.248:1.1: "This is the foremost, *bhikkhus*, among my lay disciple followers who went for refuge first — namely, the merchants Tapussa and Bhallika.
an1.249:1.1: … Among givers — namely, the householder Sudatta Anāthapiṇḍika.
an1.250:1.1: … Among speakers on *dhamma* — namely, the householder Citta of Macchikāsaṇḍa.
an1.251:1.1: … Among those who win over an assembly with the four bases of fellowship — namely, Hatthaka of Āḷavī.
an1.252:1.1: … Among givers of excellent things — namely, Mahānāma the Sakyan.
an1.253:1.1: … Among givers of pleasing things — namely, the householder Ugga of Vesālī.
an1.254:1.1: … Among those who attend on the *Saṅgha* — namely, the householder Ugga of Hatthigāma.
an1.255:1.1: … Among those with verified confidence — namely, Sūrambaṭṭha.
an1.256:1.1: … Among those with confidence in a person — namely, Jīvaka Komārabhacca.
an1.257:1.1: … Among those who are intimate — namely, the householder Nakulapitā."
